Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.model

Class AbstractModel

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.model.AbstractModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAlgorithm, IInteruptible, IModel
public abstract class AbstractModel extends Object implements IModel
Model classes can use this abstract base class to implement common code instead of implementing the IModel interface.

    • AbstractModel

      public AbstractModel(List<ValidObservation> obs)

  • Method Details

    • interrupt

      public void interrupt()
      Default behaviour for model run interrupt: set flag.
      Specified by:
      interrupt in interface IInteruptible

    • collectObs

      public void collectObs(double modelValue, ValidObservation ob, String comment)
      Collect fit and residual observations and incrementally compute the sum of squared residuals for use in fit metrics.
      Parameters:
      modelValue - A model-computed value
      ob - The observation (at time t) being modeled

    • getFit

      public List<ValidObservation> getFit()
      Return the fitted observations, after having executed the algorithm.
      Specified by:
      getFit in interface IModel
      Returns:
      A list of observations that represent the fit.

    • getResiduals

      public List<ValidObservation> getResiduals()
      Return the residuals as observations, after having executed the algorithm.
      Specified by:
      getResiduals in interface IModel
      Returns:
      A list of observations that represent the residuals.

    • getParameters

      public List<PeriodFitParameters> getParameters()
      Return the list of coefficients that gives rise to the model. May return null.
      Specified by:
      getParameters in interface IModel
      Returns:
      A list of fit coefficients or null if none available.

    • hasFuncDesc

      public boolean hasFuncDesc()
      Does this model have a function-based description?
      Specified by:
      hasFuncDesc in interface IModel
      Returns:
      True or false.

    • getFunctionStrings

      public Map<String,String> getFunctionStrings()
      Return a mapping from names to strings representing model functions.
      Specified by:
      getFunctionStrings in interface IModel
      Returns:
      The model function string map.

    • getModelFunction

      public ContinuousModelFunction getModelFunction()
      Returns the model function and context. This is required for creating a line plot to show the model as a continuous function. If a model creator cannot sensibly return such a function, it may return null and no such plot will be possible. It could also be useful for analysis purposes, e.g. analytic extrema finding.
      Specified by:
      getModelFunction in interface IModel
      Returns:
      The function object.

    • rootMeanSquare

      public void rootMeanSquare()
      Compute the root mean square. pre-condition: assumes sum of squared residuals has been computed

    • informationCriteria

      public void informationCriteria(double numberOfEstimatedParams)
      Compute the Bayesian and Aikake Information Criteria (BIC and AIC) fit metrics pre-condition: assumes sum of squared residuals has been computed
      Parameters:
      numberOfEstimatedParams - The number of estimated parameters, e.g. polynomial degree

    • fitMetrics

      public void fitMetrics() throws AlgorithmError
      Gather fit metrics string.
      Throws:
      AlgorithmError

    • toVeLaString

      public abstract String toVeLaString()
      Returns:
      a string representing the model as a VeLa function

    • functionStrings

      public void functionStrings()
      Put function strings into the map

    • getAIC

      public double getAIC()
      Returns:
      Aikake Information Criteria

    • getBIC

      public double getBIC()
      Returns:
      Bayesian Information Criteria

    • getRMS

      public double getRMS()
      Returns:
      Root mean square

    • getDescription

      public abstract String getDescription()
      Return a human-readable description of this model.
      Specified by:
      getDescription in interface IModel
      Returns:
      The model description.

    • getKind

      public abstract String getKind()
      Return a human-readable 'kind' string (e.g. "Model", "Polynomial Fit") indicating what kind of a model this is.
      Specified by:
      getKind in interface IModel
      Returns:
      The 'kind' string.
